description: Codex Web /add page production-readiness pass: draft persistence (local + server), Cmd+Enter submit, first-frame state consistency, full mode buttons (URL/Photo/File/Voice/Bookmarklet), queue-card navigation, and minimal /memos/[id] detail page. See tasks/prd-codex-add-page-v0-5.md.

userStories.title: Add drafts schema and migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a drafts table so user drafts can be persisted server-side.
acceptanceCriteria: Create drafts table with columns: id (uuid pk), user_id (fk), content (text), type (varchar), updated_at (timestamptz default now())
Unique constraint on (user_id) — one draft per user for /add
Generate and run migration successfully
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement GET /api/drafts/add endpoint
userStories.description: As a client, I want to fetch the current user's latest draft on page load.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/drafts/add returns 200 with { content, type, updatedAt } when draft exists
Returns 204 when no draft exists
Returns 401 when unauthenticated
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement PUT /api/drafts/add endpoint
userStories.description: As a client, I want to upsert the current user's draft idempotently.
acceptanceCriteria: PUT /api/drafts/add accepts { content, type } and upserts by user_id
Returns 200 with updated draft
Validates content length <= 100KB and type in enum
Returns 401 when unauthenticated, 400 on validation failure
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement DELETE /api/drafts/add endpoint
userStories.description: As a client, I want to clear the saved draft after successful submission.
acceptanceCriteria: DELETE /api/drafts/add removes draft for current user, returns 204
Idempotent — returns 204 even when no draft existed
Returns 401 when unauthenticated
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add localStorage draft persistence on /add
userStories.description: As a user, I want my draft to survive a page refresh via localStorage.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking Save draft writes { content, type, attachments_meta, savedAt } to localStorage key 'codex:add:draft' (versioned prefix 'v1:')
On page mount, if local draft exists and savedAt is within 30 days, restore content/type and show 'Draft restored' banner with Discard button
Banner auto-hides after 5s or when user starts editing
Successful POST /api/memos clears the localStorage key
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Sync drafts to server with debounce + conflict resolution
userStories.description: As a multi-device user, I want my draft to sync across devices via the drafts API.
acceptanceCriteria: After Save draft, debounce 1.5s then PUT /api/drafts/add
Retry up to 2 times on network error, silent on failure
On mount, prefer local draft; if local is empty, GET /api/drafts/add and restore
When both exist, use the one with newer updatedAt
On 401, degrade to local-only without error toast
Successful POST /api/memos calls DELETE /api/drafts/add
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add Cmd+Enter / Ctrl+Enter submit shortcut
userStories.description: As a keyboard user, I want to submit with Cmd/Ctrl+Enter inside the textarea.
acceptanceCriteria: Textarea keydown handler triggers Add when (metaKey || ctrlKey) && key === 'Enter'
No-op when Add button is disabled (empty content or submitting)
Ignored when event.isComposing === true (IME safety)
Hint text shows below input: '⌘/Ctrl + Enter to submit'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Fix breadcrumb first-frame inconsistency
userStories.description: As a user, I want the breadcrumb to show 'CODEX / Add' immediately on navigation, not after refresh.
acceptanceCriteria: Breadcrumb component reads current route from usePathname() (or server-resolved per route)
Navigating from /home, /wiki, /chat to /add shows 'Add' in first frame
Direct visits to /add and /add?from=... show 'Add' in first frame
No layout shift on hydration
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Return full memo object from POST /api/memos and optimistic queue update
userStories.description: As a user, I want a newly submitted item to show QUEUED immediately, no refresh needed.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/memos 201 response body includes complete memo: { id, type, content, compile_status: 'queued', created_at }
Client optimistically prepends the response memo to Compile Queue without refetching
On 4xx/5xx, revert the optimistic insert and show toast
Queue item renders QUEUED label immediately based on compile_status
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Wire SSE compile-status updates to in-place queue item rerender
userStories.description: As a user, I want queue items to update from QUEUED → COMPILING → DONE in real time.
acceptanceCriteria: Client subscribes to /api/stream/compile and matches events by memo id
compile_status transitions update the matching queue item in place
When status becomes 'done', item moves to Recently Compiled section
When status becomes 'failed', item shows FAILED badge
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Implement GET /api/memos/[id] endpoint
userStories.description: As a client, I want to fetch a single memo's full data for the detail page.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/memos/[id] returns 200 with { id, type, content, compile_status, compiled_at, compiled_payload, created_at, attachments }
Returns 404 when memo does not exist or belongs to another user
Returns 401 when unauthenticated
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement POST /api/memos/[id]/recompile endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to retry a failed compilation.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/memos/[id]/recompile re-enqueues the memo, returns 200 with updated memo
Allowed only when compile_status === 'failed'; returns 409 otherwise
Rate-limited to once per 5 minutes per memo, returns 429 when limited
Returns 404 / 401 appropriately
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Build minimal /memos/[id] detail page
userStories.description: As a user, I want a detail page that shows a memo's content, type, status, and compiled payload.
acceptanceCriteria: New route /memos/[id] as Server Component, fetches via GET /api/memos/[id]
Renders content with preserved newlines and safe HTML escaping
Shows type badge, status badge (QUEUED/COMPILING/DONE/FAILED), created_at
When compile_status === 'done', renders compiled_payload
Breadcrumb shows 'CODEX / Add / Memo' with back button to /add
404 page for missing memos, error.tsx for server errors
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Subscribe to SSE on detail page for non-terminal statuses
userStories.description: As a user, I want the detail page to update live while a memo is compiling.
acceptanceCriteria: When compile_status is 'queued' or 'compiling', subscribe to /api/stream/compile?id=<id>
Update status badge and compiled_payload in place when event arrives
Close SSE connection when status becomes 'done' or 'failed' or component unmounts
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add Retry button on failed memos in detail page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to retry a failed compilation from the detail page.
acceptanceCriteria: When compile_status === 'failed', show error message and Retry button
Retry button calls POST /api/memos/[id]/recompile and refreshes status to QUEUED
On 429, show toast with cooldown message; on 5xx, show toast
Button disabled while request is in flight
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Make queue cards navigate to /memos/[id]
userStories.description: As a user, I want to click a queue card body to open the memo detail page.
acceptanceCriteria: Card body uses next/link to /memos/[id] (middle-click opens new tab)
Right-side LIGHT/FULL toggle and ✕ buttons stopPropagation, do not navigate
Card has role='link' and is keyboard-focusable; Enter/Space triggers navigation
Hover/focus visual feedback preserved
Applies to both Compile Queue and Recently Compiled lists
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Fix URL mode behavior on /add
userStories.description: As a user, clicking URL should switch to URL input mode, not autofill the current page URL.
acceptanceCriteria: Click URL button sets mode = 'url', highlights button, changes placeholder to 'Paste a URL (https://...)'
Textarea content is NOT modified; window.location.href is no longer auto-filled
Live validation: invalid URL disables Add button and shows 'Enter a valid URL'
Valid URL shows host preview below input (e.g., 'example.com')
Toggling off URL mode preserves textarea content
POST /api/memos body uses { type: 'url', content: <url> }

userStories.title: Make Voice button visibly disabled with tooltip
userStories.description: As a user, I want the Voice button to show clear disabled state with explanation.
acceptanceCriteria: Voice button renders with disabled visual style (reduced opacity, not-allowed cursor)
Hover and keyboard focus show tooltip 'Voice input — coming soon' via aria-describedby
Click has no side effect (no toast, no state change)

userStories.title: Fix Bookmarklet button — show Modal with script and instructions
userStories.description: As a user, I want the Bookmarklet button to show a Modal with the drag-to-bookmark link and copy script, not attach an image.
acceptanceCriteria: Click Bookmarklet opens a Modal with: drag-to-bookmark anchor Save to Codex, instructions, Copy script button, Close button
Modal does NOT attach IMG_3836.PNG or any placeholder file
Closing Modal preserves textarea content, mode, and attachments
Copy script button copies the bookmarklet source via navigator.clipboard

userStories.title: Add attachments column to memos schema and migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to store attachment metadata on memos.
acceptanceCriteria: Add attachments jsonb column to memos table, default '[]'::jsonb
Shape: Array<{ url, mime, size, original_name }>
Generate and run migration successfully
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Extend POST /api/memos to accept multipart/form-data with attachments
userStories.description: As a client, I want to upload files alongside a memo in a single request.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/memos accepts multipart/form-data while remaining backward-compatible with application/json
Multipart fields: type, content, files[]
MIME whitelist: image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp, application/pdf, text/markdown, text/plain, application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document, application/rtf
Size limits: images <=10MB each (max 4), files <=25MB (max 1)
Upload to existing object storage, write attachments metadata into memo row
Returns 413 on oversize, 415 on bad MIME, 400 on missing fields
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement Photo mode on /add
userStories.description: As a user, clicking Photo opens an image picker and previews selected images.
acceptanceCriteria: Click Photo triggers hidden <input type='file' accept='image/*' capture='environment'>
Up to 4 photos per memo; over limit shows 'Up to 4 photos per memo'
Each image <=10MB; oversize shows 'Image too large (max 10MB)'
Preview chip above textarea: 64x64 thumbnail + filename + size + ✕ remove
Submit sends multipart POST /api/memos with type='photo' and files[]
Removing all photos clears Photo mode highlight
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Implement File mode on /add
userStories.description: As a user, clicking File opens a system file picker for documents.
acceptanceCriteria: Click File triggers hidden <input type='file' accept='.pdf,.md,.txt,.docx,.rtf'>
Single file per memo, <=25MB; oversize shows clear error
Preview chip: file icon + filename + size + ✕ remove
Submit sends multipart POST /api/memos with type='file'

userStories.title: Add drag-and-drop file handling to /add
userStories.description: As a user, I want to drag files onto the /add page to attach them.
acceptanceCriteria: Dragging files over the /add page shows a drop overlay

userStories.title: Show attachments on memo detail page and preserve on compile failure

acceptanceCriteria: /memos/[id] renders attachments list with thumbnails (images) or icons (files) and original_name

userStories.title: Add analytics events for /add interactions

acceptanceCriteria: Fire events via existing analytics: add.draft.save, add.draft.restore, add.submit, add.submit.shortcut, add.mode.switch, memo.detail.view, memo.recompile
